name: openclaw-memory-max
description: SOTA Memory Suite for OpenClaw. Adds Utility-Weighted Retrieval, Active Context Compression, a Causal Knowledge Graph, Cross-Encoder Reranking, and Nightly Sleep-Cycle consolidation.
author: Stanislav Stolberg

scripts.audit: node -e "const path = require('path'); const fs = require('fs'); const baseDir = process.env.OPENCLAW_HOME || path.join(process.env.HOME || '/root', '.openclaw'); const memDir = path.join(baseDir, 'memory'); const dbPath = path.join(memDir, 'main.sqlite'); const scoresPath = path.join(memDir, 'utility_scores.json'); const graphPath = path.join(memDir, 'causal_graph.json'); console.log('main.sqlite present:', fs.existsSync(dbPath)); console.log('utility_scores.json present:', fs.existsSync(scoresPath)); console.log('causal_graph.json present:', fs.existsSync(graphPath));"
scripts.test: tsc --noEmit && node -e "require('./dist/index.js'); console.log('[test] Entry point loaded successfully');"
